channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sofia Andres’ Rise as a Kapamilya Star Through Key Teleserye Roles
item.description: Ipinapakita sa artikulo ang naging journey ni Sofia Andres bilang isang Kapamilya actress na unti-unting umangat sa industriya dahil sa kanyang mga memorable na teleserye roles. Mula sa kanyang early ...

item.title: Tanzania to host COP12 in Dar es Salaam focusing on marine and coastal ecosystem protection
item.description: Tanzania is making strong preparations to host the 12th Conference of the Parties (COP12) under the Nairobi Convention, a major regional meeting focused on protecting marine and coastal ecosystems in ...

item.title: Government moves to make school mobile phone bans legally enforceable
item.description: The UK government is preparing to introduce legislation that would make bans on mobile phones in schools a legal requirement rather than guidance. The proposal forms part of an amendment to the Childr...

item.title: Large study finds IVF hormone add-on provides no benefit for pregnancy or birth outcomes
item.description: A major international study has found that a commonly used IVF hormone ‘add-on’ does not improve pregnancy or live birth rates, raising fresh concerns about the use of fertility treatments without str...

item.title: Why Wellington’s severe flooding shows how ordinary storm systems can produce extreme rainfall impacts
item.description: A major storm system brought devastating flash flooding to Wellington in early April 2026, with rainfall totals reaching extreme levels over a very short period. In parts of southern Wellington, more ...

item.title: Trailer of ‘Raja Shivaji’ showcases Riteish Deshmukh’s directorial biopic on Maratha emperor
item.description: The trailer of the upcoming film ‘Raja Shivaji’ has been released, offering a glimpse into a grand biographical portrayal of the legendary Maratha emperor Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. The film is both...

item.title: The Law According to Lidia Poët concludes with emotional final season as fans praise acclaimed Netflix drama
item.description: The Netflix series The Law According to Lidia Poët has released its third and final season, drawing strong reactions from viewers and critics alike. The historical crime drama, which first premiered i...

item.title: Seven members of Amish family die in Pennsylvania house explosion and fire
item.description: Seven people, including an Amish mother and her six children, have died following a devastating house explosion and fire in Lamar Township, Clinton County, Pennsylvania. Emergency services were called...

item.title: Gachagua outlines regional tours and UK trip ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, the Democracy for Citizens Party (DCP) leader and former deputy president, has revealed his plans to travel to London as part of wider diaspora engagement efforts ahead of the 2027 G...

item.title: Docuseries explores the rise and background of gangster Lawrence Bishnoi
item.description: A new Hindi docuseries titled ‘Lawrence of Punjab’, directed by Raghav Darr, is set to release on April 27 on ZEE5. The series focuses on the life and rise of Lawrence Bishnoi, a well-known gangster w...

item.title: Former X Factor contestant Gabrielle Carrington charged with attempted murder following car incident outside London nightclub
item.description: A former X Factor finalist, Gabrielle Carrington, aged 29 and known online as RIELLEUK, has been charged with attempted murder, grievous bodily harm with intent, actual bodily harm, and drink-driving....

item.title: Trump’s Dispute With Pope Leo XIV Creates Tension Among Catholic Supporters
item.description: A growing rift between President Donald Trump and Pope Leo XIV is causing unease among American Catholics, including many who supported Trump in the 2024 election. The conflict began after Pope Leo cr...

item.title: Light earthquake of magnitude 3.4 strikes Karachi and nearby areas; no damage reported
item.description: A mild earthquake measuring 3.4 on the Richter scale jolted Karachi and its surrounding areas, as confirmed by the Pakistan Meteorological Department’s National Seismic Monitoring Centre (NSMC). Accor...

item.title: US singer d4vd charged with murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez whose remains were found in his car
item.description: American singer d4vd, whose real name is David Anthony Burke, has been formally charged with the first-degree murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez. The teenager was reported missing in 2024 a...

item.title: Expert panel divided on including AI chatbots in Canada’s online harms legislation
item.description: An advisory group tasked with guiding Canada’s upcoming online harms legislation is split on whether the proposed law should regulate AI chatbots. The 11-member expert panel, reconvened by the federal...

item.title: Tinubu Approves New Police Academy Campus in Ogun with ₦15 Billion Funding
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don approve the establishment of a new campus for the Nigeria Police Academy for Erinja, inside Yewa South Local Government Area of Ogun State. This move follow the Nigeria...

item.title: Rising fuel and material costs push up construction prices across Australia
item.description: Boral, one of Australia’s largest building materials suppliers, has significantly increased the fuel surcharge it applies to concrete deliveries, more than doubling the fee as global energy pressures ...

item.title: JEE Main Session 2 BE/BTech Result Updates, Scorecards and Final Answer Key Information (NTA April Session)

item.title: Critics argue that South Africa’s limited lenacapavir rollout falls short of national HIV prevention needs
item.description: This opinion article examines South Africa’s approach to introducing lenacapavir, a long-acting HIV prevention injection that has been described as a major scientific breakthrough. The authors argue t...

item.title: Free reconstructive surgery camp boosts access and skills in Tanzania’s healthcare sector
item.description: More than 300 patients in Tanzania have received life-changing treatment through a free reconstructive surgery camp held in Dar es Salaam. The initiative is a joint effort involving Aga Khan Hospital,...
